title: The Colosseum Falls Apart
description: Pages 1–5 focus on the colosseum falls apart, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Announcer, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as doflamingo traps Dressrosa inside the Birdcage and turns the entire kingdom into a survival game with bounties on his enemies.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: The ring is completely falling apart!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And if my eyes aren't deceiving me, it looks like even the water level is sinking!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Every- one, please evacuate the arena ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: We can no longer guarantee the safety of this Colosseum!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Stop!! We're not letting you have that prize!!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: every- one else is out of the ring!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Victory goes to whoever gets their hands on this, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We...!! We have a Victor!!! Victory!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: This hardly seems the time for it, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Shockingly enough, one contender has taken Adrian- Tage of the confusion to obtain today's prize, the Mera Mera no mi!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: It's the biggest dark horse of this whole tour- nament....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Ahhh!! Super- Senpai, can't you help me too?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: You are a man, aren't you?! Protect your own hide!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: I'm going to do another one, so watch out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: No, wait...it's not hot at all!! I was imagining it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: He went and ate the Mera Mera!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Hmm?! could that be... from the Revoul- Tionary army...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Your clothes!! I've got them right here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: ACE! I'm going to use your technique!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: I'm not letting your leave this place!!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Your target is the smile factory!! I'm right, nyehhh?!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Run for it!!! Don't let him lay a finger on usoland!!!

summary: The Colosseum Falls Apart develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Colosseum Announcer, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
